zh.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Mandeville於0981年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦。他和Mrs. Athelaise Maneville至少有1個兒子。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Mandeville于0981年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦。他和Mrs. Athelaise Maneville至少有1个儿子。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘Attainment’.

nameMeanings.name: Mandeville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Armand, Gabrielle, Camille, Emile, Fernand, Fernande, Gaston, Jean-Paul, Lucien, Michel.

French: habitational name from Mandeville, the name of two places in Normandy, derived from Latin magna villa ‘large estate’, or a variant of Manneville, a habitational name from Manneville, the name of several places in Normandy (see 2 below). Compare Montville and Monville .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Manneville (Seine-Maritime, Calvados), Manneville-sur-Risle (Eure), or Magneville (Manche).

variants.name: Mansfield
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so named in Nottinghamshire. The placename means ‘open land by the river Maun’, from the river name Maun (which may take its name from a hill named with Old English mamme ‘teat’) + Old English feld ‘open country’.
Irish (Waterford): when not an importation of 1, this is an altered form of the Norman name de Manville (see Mandeville 3).
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Mansfeld, a habitational name from a place so called in Saxony.

variants.name: Manderville
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mandeville  .

variants.name: Manwell
meanings: Transferred use of the Scottish surname, in origin a local name from a minor place on the River Tweed, named as ‘the stream (Old English well(a)) of Mack’. The latter is a form of Magnus . Maxwell was the middle name of the newspaper tycoon William Maxwell Aitken , Lord Beaverbrook ( 1879–1964 ), who was born in Canada, and it has been used as a given name among his descendants. It is now also frequently taken as an expansion of Max .

variants.name: Manville
meanings: English (Sussex and Lancashire): variant of   Mandeville  .
Altered form of   Mainville   1, a surname of Swiss French origin (see   Miville  ).
French: variant of Menville, a habitational name from Menville in Haute-Garonne, and also of Mainville 2.

variants.name: Mundell
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): variant of   Mandeville  .
Americanized form of German Mündel (or some other similar, like-sounding surname): nickname for someone with a prominent mouth, from Middle High German munt, mündelīn ‘(little) mouth’.

variants.name: Monville
meanings: Altered form of French   Mandeville  .
Walloon: habitational name from Monville in Namur province in Wallonia (Belgium), of the same etymology as in 3 below.
In some cases possibly also French: habitational name from Montville in Seine-Maritime or Monville in Calvados, both named with Old French mont ‘mountain, hill’ + ville ‘settlement’.

variants.name: Mandal
meanings: variant of Mendel , but assumed by folk etymology to be from German Männl, a diminutive of Mann ‘man’. It probably has no connection with the Yiddish vocabulary word mandel ‘almond’.

variants.name: Montville
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Vernice.
Altered form of French   Mandeville  .
French: variant of   Monville  . This surname is very rare in France, found mainly in Creuse.

variants.name: Manfull
meanings: English (Midlands): probably a variant of   Mandeville  . Compare   Manville  .

historicEvents.title: Danes Attack London
historicEvents.description: Danes and Norwegians attacked London unsuccessfully in 994.

historicEvents.title: St. Brice's Day Massacre
historicEvents.description: King Aethelred ordered all Danish men in England to be killed. It is unknown how many Danes were killed due to this order.

historicEvents.title: Sweyn Forkbeard
historicEvents.description: The Danes raided and captured England. Sweyn, King of Danes, was declared King of England on Christmas Day.

en.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Mandeville was born in 0981, in London, Middlesex, England. He had at least 1 son with Mrs. Athelaise Maneville. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Mandeville est né en 0981, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs. Athelaise Maneville. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Mandeville wurde 0981 in London, Middlesex, England geboren. Er hatte mit Mrs. Athelaise Maneville mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Mandeville è nato il nel 0981 nel London, Middlesex, England. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mrs. Athelaise Maneville. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.London, Middlesex, England: イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン
ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Mandevilleは0981年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた。彼はMrs. Athelaise Manevilleとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Mandeville(은)는 0981년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났다. 그는 Mrs. Athelaise Maneville(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Mandeville nasceu em 0981, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mrs. Athelaise Maneville. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Mandeville родился в 0981 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mrs. Athelaise Maneville. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Mandeville nació en 0981, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mrs. Athelaise Maneville. Murió en su pueblo.
